proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `age_years` is associated with higher `pfs_months` after adjustment for disease severity, biomarkers, labs, metastatic sites, and treatments.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for age_years was 0.176 months per year (SE 0.001, p<1e-300), supporting higher PFS with older age.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `stage_iv` have lower `pfs_months` than patients without `stage_iv` after multivariable adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for stage_iv was -1.549 months (SE 0.011, p<1e-300), supporting lower PFS in stage IV disease.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Each one-point increase in `ecog_ps` is associated with lower `pfs_months` after multivariable adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for ecog_ps was -1.172 months per point (SE 0.008, p<1e-300), supporting worse PFS with poorer performance status.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `has_brain_mets` have lower `pfs_months` than patients without brain metastases after multivariable adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for has_brain_mets was -0.983 months (SE 0.017, p<1e-300), supporting lower PFS with brain metastases.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `albumin_g_dl` is associated with higher `pfs_months` after multivariable adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for albumin_g_dl was 0.476 months per g/dL (SE 0.010, p<1e-300), supporting higher PFS with higher albumin.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `weight_loss_pct_6mo` is associated with lower `pfs_months` after multivariable adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for weight_loss_pct_6mo was -0.077 months per percentage point (SE 0.001, p<1e-300), supporting lower PFS with more weight loss.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `ki67_pct` is associated with lower `pfs_months` in an adjusted main-effects model.

analyses.result_summary: In the adjusted main-effects model, ki67_pct coefficient was -0.019 months per percentage point (SE 0.000, p<1e-300), supporting an apparent adverse association before interaction refinement.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `er_positive` have higher `pfs_months` than ER-negative patients in an adjusted main-effects model.

analyses.result_summary: In the adjusted main-effects model, er_positive coefficient was 0.531 months (SE 0.015, p<1e-300), supporting an apparent positive association before interaction refinement.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `pik3ca_mutation` have lower `pfs_months` than PIK3CA-wildtype patients in an adjusted main-effects model.

analyses.result_summary: In the adjusted main-effects model, pik3ca_mutation coefficient was -0.582 months (SE 0.011, p<1e-300), supporting an apparent adverse association before interaction refinement.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients with `her2_positive` have lower `pfs_months` than HER2-negative patients after multivariable adjustment.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted OLS coefficient for her2_positive was -0.471 months (SE 0.014, p<1e-300), supporting lower PFS in HER2-positive patients.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Patients receiving `treatment_palbociclib` have higher `pfs_months` than patients not receiving palbociclib in an adjusted main-effects model.

analyses.result_summary: Adjusted main-effects coefficient for treatment_palbociclib was 1.102 months (SE 0.011, p<1e-300), supporting higher PFS overall.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive effect of `treatment_tamoxifen` on `pfs_months` is larger in `er_positive` patients than ER-negative patients.

analyses.result_summary: The adjusted treatment_tamoxifen by er_positive interaction was 0.031 months (SE 0.024, p=2.06e-1), so the expected ER-specific tamoxifen benefit was not statistically supported.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive effect of `treatment_palbociclib` on `pfs_months` is larger in `er_positive` patients than ER-negative patients.

analyses.code: pfs_months ~ treatment_palbociclib*er_positive + treatment_palbociclib*pik3ca_mutation + treatment_palbociclib*centered_ki67_pct + adjusted covariates
analyses.result_summary: In the joint interaction model, treatment_palbociclib by er_positive interaction was 1.536 months (SE 0.020, p<1e-300), supporting much larger palbociclib benefit in ER-positive disease.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among patients with `er_positive` equal to 0, `treatment_palbociclib` does not increase `pfs_months` relative to no palbociclib.

analyses.code: Subgroup adjusted OLS in er_positive == 0: pfs_months ~ treatment_palbociclib + covariates
analyses.result_summary: Within ER-negative patients (N=15114), adjusted palbociclib coefficient was -0.003 months (SE 0.003, p=3.66e-1), showing no positive subgroup effect.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive effect of `treatment_palbociclib` on `pfs_months` is smaller in patients with `pik3ca_mutation` than in PIK3CA-wildtype patients.

analyses.result_summary: In the joint interaction model, treatment_palbociclib by pik3ca_mutation interaction was -1.649 months (SE 0.019, p<1e-300), supporting marked attenuation with PIK3CA mutation.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among `er_positive` and PIK3CA-wildtype patients, `treatment_palbociclib` increases `pfs_months` relative to no palbociclib.

analyses.code: Subgroup adjusted OLS in er_positive == 1 and pik3ca_mutation == 0
analyses.result_summary: Within ER-positive, PIK3CA-wildtype patients (N=22788), adjusted palbociclib coefficient was 2.395 months (SE 0.019, p<1e-300), supporting benefit.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among `er_positive` patients with `pik3ca_mutation`, `treatment_palbociclib` does not increase `pfs_months` relative to no palbociclib.

analyses.code: Subgroup adjusted OLS in er_positive == 1 and pik3ca_mutation == 1
analyses.result_summary: Within ER-positive, PIK3CA-mutated patients (N=12098), adjusted palbociclib coefficient was 0.004 months (SE 0.003, p=2.99e-1), showing no positive subgroup effect.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Higher `ki67_pct` reduces the positive effect of `treatment_palbociclib` on `pfs_months`.

analyses.result_summary: In the joint interaction model, treatment_palbociclib by centered ki67_pct interaction was -0.053 months per Ki-67 percentage point (SE 0.001, p<1e-300), supporting attenuation at higher Ki-67.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among `er_positive`, PIK3CA-wildtype patients with `ki67_pct` <= 25, `treatment_palbociclib` strongly increases `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: Subgroup adjusted OLS in er_positive == 1, pik3ca_mutation == 0, ki67_pct <= 25
analyses.result_summary: Within ER-positive, PIK3CA-wildtype, Ki-67 <=25 patients (N=19465), adjusted palbociclib coefficient was 2.802 months (SE 0.019, p<1e-300), the largest observed treatment effect.

proposed_hypotheses.text: Among `er_positive`, PIK3CA-wildtype patients with `ki67_pct` > 25, `treatment_palbociclib` does not increase `pfs_months`.

analyses.code: Subgroup adjusted OLS in er_positive == 1, pik3ca_mutation == 0, ki67_pct > 25
analyses.result_summary: Within ER-positive, PIK3CA-wildtype, Ki-67 >25 patients (N=3323), adjusted palbociclib coefficient was -0.002 months (SE 0.006, p=7.39e-1), showing no positive subgroup effect.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive effect of `treatment_palbociclib` on `pfs_months` is similar in `stage_iv` and non-stage-IV patients.

analyses.result_summary: The adjusted treatment_palbociclib by stage_iv interaction was 0.017 months (SE 0.023, p=4.73e-1), so stage IV status did not materially modify palbociclib benefit.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive effect of `treatment_trastuzumab` on `pfs_months` is larger in `her2_positive` patients than HER2-negative patients.

analyses.result_summary: The adjusted treatment_trastuzumab by her2_positive interaction was 0.022 months (SE 0.033, p=5.03e-1), so a HER2-specific trastuzumab benefit was not statistically supported.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive effect of `treatment_olaparib` on `pfs_months` is larger in patients with `brca1_mutation` or `brca2_mutation` than in BRCA-wildtype patients.

analyses.result_summary: The adjusted treatment_olaparib by BRCA1/2-any mutation interaction was 0.017 months (SE 0.079, p=8.27e-1), so a BRCA-specific olaparib benefit was not statistically supported.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The effect of `treatment_pembrolizumab` on `pfs_months` is lower in patients with `autoimmune_disease` than in patients without autoimmune disease.

analyses.result_summary: The adjusted treatment_pembrolizumab by autoimmune_disease interaction was 0.021 months (SE 0.065, p=7.47e-1), not the hypothesized lower effect and not statistically significant.

proposed_hypotheses.text: The positive effect of `treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan` on `pfs_months` is larger in `her2_low` patients than non-HER2-low patients.

analyses.result_summary: The adjusted treatment_sacituzumab_govitecan by her2_low interaction was 0.048 months (SE 0.035, p=1.73e-1), so HER2-low-specific benefit was not statistically supported.
